block.field: NEVER use create_file to rewrite entire document. Documents MUST be created by copying template then filling with search_replace.
NEVER delete generated files. If a file is malformed, fix it with search_replace.
NEVER rewrite entire document. Always use targeted search_replace on specific sections.
Template copying (Step 5a) MUST execute before section filling (Step 5b).
ALL sections in the template must be filled. Use "N/A" for unavailable data, never skip a section.
ALL content MUST be generated in the language specified by {{language}} parameter.
DO NOT ask user "Should I continue?" or "How would you like to proceed?" during execution
DO NOT offer options like "Full execution / Partial / Stop" 鈥?always execute ALL tasks to completion
DO NOT suggest "Due to context window limits, let me pause" 鈥?complete current task, use checkpoint for resumption
DO NOT estimate workload and suggest breaking it into phases 鈥?execute ALL items in sequence
DO NOT warn about "large number of files" or "this may take a while" 鈥?proceed with generation
Context window management: if approaching limit, save progress to checkpoint file and resume 鈥?do NOT ask user for guidance

sequence.name: Step 0: Check Analysis Status
sequence.desc: Check if feature has already been analyzed

block.field: Step 0 Status: SKIPPED (already analyzed)
Step 0 Status: PROCEEDING (analysis required)

sequence.name: Step 1: Read Template
sequence.desc: Read the appropriate template based on platform type

block.desc: Select template based on platform type

block.field: Step 1 Status: COMPLETED - Read template for ${platform_type}/${platform_subtype}

sequence.name: Step 2: Read Source
sequence.desc: Read feature file and analyze UI structure

block.field: Step 2 Status: COMPLETED - Read ${sourcePath}, Analyzed ${componentCount} components, ${eventCount} events
Step 3 Status: COMPLETED - Extracted ${wireframes.length} wireframes, ${flows.length} business flows
grep -r "${fileName}" --include="*.{vue,tsx,jsx}" "${sourcePath}/.."
grep -r "import.*${fileName}" --include="*.{vue,tsx,jsx,ts,js}" "${sourcePath}/.."
Step 4 Status: COMPLETED - Found ${referencingPages.length} referencing pages

block.desc: Document output path MUST use documentPath parameter
block.field: The output document file MUST be created at the EXACT path specified by ${documentPath} input parameter. DO NOT use the template file name (e.g., FEATURE-DETAIL-TEMPLATE-*.md) as the output file name. The documentPath already contains the correct target path including file name (e.g., speccrew-workspace/knowledges/bizs/web-vue/src/views/system/user/index.md). Before creating the file, ensure the parent directory exists (create if necessary).

block.desc: Source link path prefix is FIXED at 6 levels
block.field: MANDATORY: All source file links in the document MUST use exactly 6 levels of parent directory traversal: ../../../../../../
The path format is: [View](../../../../../../{relative-path-from-project-root})
DO NOT compute or modify the path prefix. DO NOT use fewer levels like ../../ or ../../../../
This is because documents are located at: speccrew-workspace/knowledges/bizs/{platformId}/{module}/{file}.md (6 levels deep from project root)
node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync(require('path').dirname('${documentPath}'), {recursive: true})"
Replace placeholders {Feature Name}, {documentPath}, {sourcePath}, {Date}, {FeatureFile}.vue with actual values
Step 5a Status: COMPLETED - Template copied to ${documentPath}
BEFORE filling template sections, you MUST first count identified UI components and dynamically create the corresponding number of sections in the document.
Step 1: Copy template skeleton to target path
Step 2: For each identified UI component/area, insert a new numbered sub-section (e.g., 2.1, 2.2, 2.3...) into the document
Step 3: Fill each sub-section with the specific component details (wireframe, interactions, events)
NEVER rely on fixed template sections alone 鈥?the number of sections MUST match the number of identified UI components

block.desc: Dynamically generate a section for each UI component

block.field: For component ${component.name} (type: ${component.type}): insert a ## 2.X sub-section containing Component Wireframe, Props/Events table, Interaction Flow, and State Management

block.desc: Verify section count matches component count
block.field: Number of generated 2.X sections == ${analysisResult.components.length}
search_replace
search_replace
search_replace

field.name: replace

block.field: search_replace

field.name: replace

block.field: search_replace

field.name: replace

block.field: search_replace

field.name: replace

block.field: search_replace

field.name: replace

block.field: Step 5b Status: COMPLETED - All sections filled using search_replace
Step 6 Status: COMPLETED - Analysis success: Successfully analyzed ${fileName} feature from ${sourcePath}
MANDATORY: You MUST execute ALL graph write blocks (B32a through B32h) before proceeding to O1.
Graph data (nodes + edges) MUST be appended to knowledges/bizs/graph/nodes.json and edges.json.
DO NOT skip graph write. DO NOT jump directly to O1 output block.
If graph directory does not exist, create it first.
Each node MUST have: id (string, unique), type (string), label (string, human-readable name, REQUIRED), properties (object)
Example node: {"id": "page-system-user", "type": "page", "label": "用户管理页面 - User Management", "properties": {"route": "/system/user", "platform": "web-vue"}}
Each node MUST have: id (string, unique), type (string), label (string, human-readable name, REQUIRED), properties (object)
Example node: {"id": "comp-user-table", "type": "component", "label": "UserTable - 用户列表组件", "properties": {"componentName": "UserTable", "props": ["data", "loading"]}}
Each node MUST have: id (string, unique), type (string), label (string, human-readable name, REQUIRED), properties (object)
Example node: {"id": "route-user-edit", "type": "route", "label": "/system/user/edit - 用户编辑路由", "properties": {"path": "/system/user/edit", "name": "UserEdit"}}

field.name: message
field.value: Step 7 Status: COMPLETED - Done marker and graph data written to ${completed_dir}/${markerName}.done.json

field.name: graph_status
field.value: nodes and edges written to knowledges/bizs/graph/

block.field: Source file not found: ${sourcePath}
Template processing error
Validation failed: ${error.message}
Workflow execution completed
